item.description: Paddy Power @paddypower · 2h Haha, no but seriously, it’s great to have Coventry back in the Premier League. Cita Paddy Power @paddypower · 2h BREAKING: Coventry have earned the right to be relegated from the 2026/27 Premier League with 20 points. 11 8 167 20 mil

item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 2h Frank Lampard completes Coventry's miracle journey back to the top flight.
Can they hold their own in the Premier League?
We've got them at 6/5 to stay up next season.
18+ | GambleAware De williamhill.com 2 1 mil
